sections.heading: 2. 配合 antd Form.Item 使用
在内部消息中的使用示例

functions.name: Editor
params:
{
  value,
  editorType = EditorType.MARKDOWN,
  height = '100%',
  disabled = false,
  placeholder,
  uploadImage,
  markdownOptions,
  jsonOptions,
  codeOptions,
  onChange,
  onReady,
}

functions.name: PlainTextEditor
params:
{
  value,
  height = '100%',
  disabled = false,
  placeholder,
  onChange,
  onReady,
}

functions.name: TiptapEditor
params:
{
  value,
  height = 500,
  disabled = false,
  placeholder,
  showToolbar = true,
  showStatusBar = true,
  uploadImage,
  onChange,
  onReady,
}

functions.name: CodeBlockModal
params:
{
  open,
  language,
  content,
  onOk,
  onCancel,
  onLanguageChange,
  onContentChange,
}

functions.name: VideoModal
params:
{
  open,
  url,
  width,
  onOk,
  onCancel,
  onUrlChange,
  onWidthChange,
}

functions.name: IframeModal
params:
{
  open,
  url,
  width,
  height,
  title,
  allowFullscreen,
  onOk,
  onCancel,
  onUrlChange,
  onWidthChange,
  onHeightChange,
  onTitleChange,
  onAllowFullscreenChange,
}

functions.name: ThemeLoading
params:
{
                                 text = '加载中',
                                 subText,
                                 fullScreen = false,
                                 className = '',
                                 style,
                                 progress,
                                 status = 'loading',
                                 autoHide = true,
                                 themeOverride,
                             }

callGraph.callee:
`
    flex items-center justify-center
    ${fullScreen
        ? 'fixed inset-0 z-[1000] bg-[var(--ant-color-bg-container)]/95 backdrop-blur-md'
        : 'py-6'
    }
    ${className}
  `.trim
